title: Flavorful Japanese Noodles Udon
description: A peppery and crumbly Japanese dish featuring genmaicha and sashimi-cut ingredients, served in a copper mug, perfect for a date night.
instructions: Bring the genmaicha tea to a boil in a large pot.
Add the udon noodles to the pot and cook for 8 minutes or until they are slightly firm in the center.
While the noodles are cooking, prepare the sashimi-cut tofu and shiso leaves.
Drain the noodles and rinse them with cold water to stop the cooking process.
In a small bowl, mix together the soy sauce, sesame seeds, and pepper.
Add the cooked noodles to the copper mug and pour the soy sauce mixture over them.
Top the noodles with the sashimi-cut tofu, shiso leaves, and pickled ginger.
Garnish with additional shiso leaves and sesame seeds if desired.
